# elves Provider

Elves terraform provider developed by FreeNow.

## Example Usage

```terraform
provider "elves" {
  host         = "http://localhost:8080"
  apikeyname   = "terraform"
  apikeysecret = "35e549cbefc04deb196413"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `apikeyname` (String) API key for you instance, can be set as environment variable _APIKEY
- `apikeysecret` (String) API key for you instance, can be set as environment variable _APIKEY
- `host` (String) API host for you instance, can be set as environment variable _HOST, if not set it will default to a..com
